reviews.school_name: Sri Krishan Sagar Public School - C Block,Sector 56
reviews.author: Abhishek Upadhyay
reviews.review_body: I have listen many times about this school the principal of this school is very rood with the staff and not pay well to the teachers and also the behavior of the teacher towards each other is not good the all try to target a particular teacher who is doing well but the teachers of this school create an environment in front of principal that the teacher is not good i just want to say that this that please change your schooling system and try to be professionals not act like beginners please make an helpful environment in the school i am one of the well wisher for you all

reviews.school_name: Sri Krishan Sagar Public School - C Block,Sector 56
reviews.author: Shailendra Singh Rawat
reviews.review_body: First of all I would like to say good morning to the respected teachers, parents and my dear friends. I would like to speech on the importance of education which is must to know by all of us. Education plays a great role in the life of everyone all through the life. SKS world school Getting proper education is very necessary to get success and happy life just like food is necessary for healthy body. It is very important to live luxurious and better life. It develops personality of the people, provides physical and mental standard and transforms people’s living status. I am very thanks work with this group

reviews.review_body: Very good teachers and really helpful,students have learnt a lot of things. I am very happy with school, teachers and staff."
